creator: vladimir.mishev@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 232060
Screenshot of `man cxgbetool` error

`man cxgbetool`

and

`man cxgbetool | col -b`

is giving this error:

warning: file '<standard input>', around line 217:
  table wider than line width
warning: file '<standard input>', around line 212:
  table squeezed horizontally to fit line length

Bug is visible in the KDE Konsole (80x25) and xterm.

I can't reproduce it in the vt (efi) console.

Both 13.0-STABLE and 13.0-RELEASE-p7 are affected.
